title: Auto TNT Cart
description: One‑click instant TNT minecart trick: press C to place rail, spawn TNT minecart, and shoot a flame arrow. Requires Fabric API.
body:
# AutoTntCart

**One‑click instant TNT minecart trick**

As long as your hotbar contains **a rail**, **a TNT minecart**, **a Flame‑enchanted bow**, and at least **one arrow**, aim at the top face of any block and press `C`. The mod will automatically:

1. Shoot a flame arrow
2. Instantly place a rail
3. Spawn a TNT minecart

The arrow will hit the minecart immediately, causing an instant explosion – a smooth and fast execution of the classic "instant minecart" technique.

## Required items
- Rail ×1
- TNT Minecart ×1
- Bow enchanted with **Flame**
- At least 1 arrow (normal, tipped, or spectral)

If the bow has the **Infinity** enchantment, the arrow will not be consumed, but you still need at least one arrow in the hotbar to be able to shoot.

## Keybind
- Default: `C` (can be changed in game settings)

## Dependencies
- **Fabric Loader** (>=0.15.0)
- **Fabric API** (>=0.102.0+1.21.1)
